name: OnGold Resources Ltd.
description: ONGold Resources Ltd. is a Canadian mineral exploration and evaluation company focused on unlocking district-scale gold potential. The company holds a significant portfolio of exploration assets in Ontario and Manitoba, most notably the Ti-pa-haa-kaa-ning (TPK) project, which covers the under-explored Stull-Wunnummin Fault Zone. With a commitment to sustainable Indigenous partnerships and a team of experienced geologists and entrepreneurs, ONGold Resources aims to become a leading gold developer in Canada, capitalizing on the high global demand for gold and the immense exploration potential of its large-scale, 100% owned properties.
